map.note: Adobe pre-migration: document current Lighthouse scores as the baseline to measure post-migration gains.
Adopt Catalog Service / CCDM as the merchandising source; bulk-load via the Adobe data tool.
Adobe: ALL customizations must move to App Builder + API Mesh; refactor in-process logic to serverless actions (locked core).
In-process extensions recreated as out-of-process; Adobe is shipping popular-extension equivalents to cut build time.
Re-platform via the integration starter kit or the ACCS REST API.
Build a new mesh or reconfigure; Adobe provides preconfigured meshes.
Event-driven sync from the PaaS instance to ACCS services.
Luma MUST migrate to Commerce Storefront on Edge Delivery (boilerplate + drop-ins).
PWA may migrate to EDS or be maintained; PWA Studio is otherwise out-of-scope.
Static content (About, blog, banners) -> AEM Services / EDS content authoring.
Migrate if using OOTB media management; no migration if already on AEM Assets.
Bulk + iterative data migration via ADOBE tooling (by request, Q1 2026). NEVER AIRA; clean/de-dupe before transfer.
Review and reconfigure custom WAF rules + IP allowlists.
Planned DNS cutover with minimal downtime; decommission PaaS after the validation period.
